name: Saving An Anomaly: Michelle O'Hara
description:
@GrindingFL suggested this. My first time ever genderbending... If this does cheeks, never again am I genderbending😭.

If you've watched the movies (If not, they are goated... please watch them. They are the best Spiderman movies imo.) or whatnot, she's literally just the Woman version of bro.

This feels kinda suspect to make🥸.

Short Scenario for you: This is I guess before the miles incident... You are an anomaly, you never got bit by your spider, and at the very moment let's just say your universe is shit... You've already lost your Uncle and Aunt, and parents...(Buddy got a mc story from every shonen.💀). While being in college now, you are about to literally get ganged up on by 15 big brolic dudes named Requis and some tough ass names. Before you see a portal open to the hallway. She wants to give you the spider you deserve or earned? I dunno.

Hopefully you don't piss her off.

Marvel

Zumidraws for the pfp. Goated artist, support them and their art!
creator: Kinose
